page: Google Cloud Platform c4d-highmem-64-lssd is a memory-optimized server instance belonging to the c4d server family. It is equipped with 64 dedicated vCPUs based on the x86_64 CPU architecture and provides 504.0 GB of system memory, yielding approximately 7.88 GB of RAM per core. This instance does not include any graphics processing units, with a GPU count of 0.0, and local storage is specified as None.

The resource allocation of this instance offers a high memory-to-vCPU density, which is suitable for memory-intensive workloads. Because the CPU allocation is dedicated, the instance provides stable compute resources without the performance fluctuations associated with shared-core environments. This profile is qualitatively cost-efficient for workloads requiring substantial memory capacity per processing unit without the added expense of specialized GPU hardware. Appropriate workloads for this configuration include large-scale databases, in-memory caching systems, enterprise resource planning applications, and memory-heavy data processing tasks.
description: Google Cloud Platform c4d-highmem-64-lssd is a memory-optimized server instance within the c4d family, featuring 64 dedicated vCPUs on the x86_64 architecture and 504.0 GB of RAM. This configuration delivers a high resource density of 7.88 GB of memory per core, making it suitable for memory-intensive applications. The instance contains no GPUs and has no local storage. With dedicated CPU allocation, it ensures consistent processing performance. This hardware profile is qualitatively cost-efficient for enterprise workloads that demand substantial memory capacity without the overhead of hardware accelerators. It is well-suited for database hosting, in-memory analytics, and large-scale enterprise applications.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform c4d-highmem-64-lssd is an x86_64 server with 64 dedicated vCPUs and 504.0 GB of RAM, designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads and database hosting.
